sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13065" key="a)polhptiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποληπτ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n13065.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pertaining to the receipt of a debt,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὁμολογία</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cod.Just.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.21.16</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
